item.title: [Articles] AI triage and health-system risk optimization: a clinical trial
item.description: This clinical trial evaluates artificial intelligence triage, benchmark datasets, decision risk controls, automation efficiency, privacy, security, cost optimization, and health economics for deployable learning value.
item.dc:title: AI triage and health-system risk optimization: a clinical trial
item.dc:creator: Example Author

item.title: [Review] Foundation models, privacy, and safety in digital health systems
item.description: This review surveys foundation model evaluation, language model governance, risk management, security, privacy, cost, and automation tradeoffs for health systems and clinical decision support.
item.dc:title: Foundation models, privacy, and safety in digital health systems
item.dc:creator: Review Author

item.title: [Series] Health AI regulation, market incentives, and operational governance
item.description: This series analyzes policy, finance, market incentives, risk controls, statistical evaluation, agent workflows, data quality, and operational governance for high ROI health technology decisions.
item.dc:title: Health AI regulation, market incentives, and operational governance
item.dc:creator: Series Author

item.title: [Correspondence] A short letter that must not enter the research queue
item.description: Correspondence item that must not enter S2PCT03 as a research-grade article.

item.title: [Comment] A commentary that must not enter the research queue
item.description: Comment item that must not enter S2PCT03 as a research-grade article.
